title: SE: Slimer's Everything!
description: This mod adds ores, trees and mobs to Minecraft! It's only in the beggining tho!
body:
Slimer's Everything is a mod for Forge 1.20.1 that adds anything! From ores and the coolest armors to elephants and tea! 

The current list of notable features is:
 Steel!
 Bronze!
 Rosegold!
 Aluminum!
 Ruby!
 Defender's armor!
 Taylor's armor and dagger!
 Gladiator's armor and axe!
 Brazilwood tree wood set! (And tea)
 Elephants!
 The Olm salamander!
 Fossils!
 Potato chips!
 Suspicious dealer! (new villager profession)
 Loads of new advancements!
 
It's recommended to use the mod with JEI installed, so you can see the recipes!

I accept suggestions for features!
The making of addons for the mod is accepted, as well as ports to Fabric or Bedrock, just contact me first.
The use of this mod in modpacks is accepted by me, but don't claim the mod as your own or sell the modpack in wich the mod is in.

Huge thanks to my friend Darp the sheep for helping me with a lot of textures!
Textures and models are subject to change in the future!
This mod is only in it's first version as of 30/09/2023 (09/30/2023 for some), that's why somethings have no apparent use. It's also my first real and oficial mod, made in MCreator.

As of 2024 I am remaking this mod, the remake will be posted here probably in the middle of the year (from may to july)
